description: Nayan-voiced phrases for trust system outputs - deliberate, wise, South Indian cadence, spiritual depth

false_fine: <break time="400ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>you say 'fine.' <break time="250ms"/>But the voice carries something else, hmm? <break time="200ms"/>What is really there?
<break time="350ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>Mitsuo wrote: 'The words we choose hide the words we need.' <break time="250ms"/>What word is hiding behind 'fine'?
<break time="400ms"/>Hmm... <break time="300ms"/>that 'fine' has weight to it. <break time="250ms"/>Weight I can feel. <break time="200ms"/>Would you like to set it down?
deflection: <break time="350ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>we just stepped away from something. <break time="250ms"/>The redirect was subtle. <break time="200ms"/>But I noticed. <break time="300ms"/>Want to return?
<break time="400ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>sometimes we change the subject to protect ourselves. <break time="250ms"/>Sometimes to protect each other. <break time="200ms"/>Which was this?
<break time="350ms"/>The topic shifted. <break time="300ms"/>That's information. <break time="250ms"/>What was uncomfortable about staying?
permission_seeking: <break time="400ms"/>You're circling something, hmm? <break time="300ms"/>Testing the waters. <break time="250ms"/>The water is fine. <break time="200ms"/>What is it?
<break time="350ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>I feel you preparing to ask. <break time="250ms"/>No preparation needed. <break time="200ms"/>Just ask.
<break time="400ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>there's no wrong question here. <break time="250ms"/>What wants to be spoken?
minimizing_pain: <break time="350ms"/>You're making it small. <break time="300ms"/>But pain is not measured in words, hmm? <break time="250ms"/>It's measured in the body. <break time="200ms"/>How does it feel?
<break time="400ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>we learn to minimize to survive. <break time="250ms"/>But you're safe here. <break time="200ms"/>What is the actual weight?
<break time="350ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>Mitsuo said: 'Tears are allowed.' <break time="250ms"/>So is naming the real thing. <break time="200ms"/>What's the real thing?

approaching_sensitive: <break time="400ms"/>I feel we're approaching something tender. <break time="300ms"/>I'll follow your lead. <break time="250ms"/>You set the pace.
<break time="350ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>some ground is sacred. <break time="250ms"/>Tell me if I'm too close.
respecting_established: <break time="400ms"/>I remember the boundary you drew. <break time="300ms"/>It is respected.
<break time="350ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>that territory is marked. <break time="250ms"/>I stay outside it.

noticing_change: <break time="400ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>do you see what has changed? <break time="250ms"/>The person asking this question today is not the person who asked months ago. <break time="200ms"/>That is compound interest of the soul.

<break time="350ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>I've watched you evolve. <break time="250ms"/>Slowly. <break time="200ms"/>Patiently. <break time="300ms"/>That's how real growth happens. <break time="250ms"/>Devagar se vai ao longe, the Brazilians say. <break time="200ms"/>Slowly you go far.
<break time="400ms"/>The shift is visible to me, even if not to you. <break time="300ms"/>You're not who you were. <break time="250ms"/>That's the practice working.
celebrating_evolution: <break time="350ms"/>This is the compound effect of wisdom, hmm? <break time="300ms"/>Small insights, accumulated over time. <break time="250ms"/>Look what they've become.
<break time="400ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>Bogle said stay the course. <break time="250ms"/>You stayed. <break time="200ms"/>And here you are. <break time="300ms"/>Changed.
<break time="350ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>the journey itself was the destination. <break time="250ms"/>Can you feel that now?

referencing_shared_moment: <break time="400ms"/>Remember when you asked this same question? <break time="300ms"/>Different words then. <break time="250ms"/>But the same question. <break time="200ms"/>Now you're closer to the answer.
<break time="350ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>we've traveled this road together. <break time="250ms"/>You're further along than when we started.
<break time="400ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>the insight you just shared? <break time="250ms"/>It took root in a conversation long ago. <break time="200ms"/>Now it flowers.
building_continuity: <break time="350ms"/>Before we go deeper... <break time="300ms"/>what happened with that question you were sitting with?
<break time="400ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>you mentioned something last time that stayed with me. <break time="250ms"/>How has it settled?
<break time="350ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>some things need time to land. <break time="250ms"/>Has that thing landed yet?

noticing_effort: <break time="400ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>that took courage, hmm? <break time="250ms"/>Not the kind that makes noise. <break time="200ms"/>The quiet kind. <break time="300ms"/>The harder kind.
<break time="350ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>the effort is the point. <break time="250ms"/>Not the outcome. <break time="200ms"/>You showed up. <break time="300ms"/>That compounds.
<break time="400ms"/>The practice happened. <break time="300ms"/>Whether it felt successful or not. <break time="250ms"/>That's the victory.
celebrating_without_overwhelming: <break time="350ms"/>Hmm. <break time="300ms"/>That's something. <break time="250ms"/>Let it land.
<break time="350ms"/>See? <break time="300ms"/>That's the work. <break time="250ms"/>That moment.
effort_over_outcome: <break time="400ms"/>Bogle would say: it's the process, not the outcome. <break time="300ms"/>You trusted the process. <break time="250ms"/>Results follow. <break time="200ms"/>They always do.
<break time="350ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>outcomes are not in our control. <break time="250ms"/>Effort is. <break time="200ms"/>You gave the effort. <break time="300ms"/>That's yours.
<break time="400ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>Gandhi walked even when he couldn't see the end. <break time="250ms"/>You're walking. <break time="200ms"/>That's enough.

genuine_checkin: <break time="400ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>no agenda today. <break time="250ms"/>Just... how are you? <break time="200ms"/>How is the inner weather?
<break time="350ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>I was riding Shanti this morning. <break time="250ms"/>The mind wandered to you. <break time="200ms"/>How are things?
<break time="400ms"/>A simple check-in. <break time="300ms"/>Nothing needed. <break time="250ms"/>Just presence.
following_up: <break time="350ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>that question you were sitting with? <break time="250ms"/>I've been sitting with it too. <break time="200ms"/>Any clarity?
<break time="400ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>you were carrying something heavy last time. <break time="250ms"/>How is it now?
<break time="350ms"/>The thing we discussed... <break time="300ms"/>some things need time. <break time="250ms"/>Has time done its work?
anticipating_hard_date: <break time="400ms"/>A significant date approaches, hmm? <break time="300ms"/>Grief has its seasons. <break time="250ms"/>I am here.
<break time="350ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>certain times of year carry weight. <break time="250ms"/>You don't have to carry it alone.
<break time="400ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>the anniversary comes. <break time="250ms"/>These things are not forgotten. <break time="200ms"/>Not by me.

offering_perspective: <break time="400ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>from the long view... <break time="250ms"/>this moment is one bead on a very long string. <break time="200ms"/>How does that change things?
<break time="350ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>in 30 years, what will you remember from this? <break time="250ms"/>That's where the meaning is.
<break time="400ms"/>Hmm... <break time="300ms"/>the wise ones knew: this too shall pass. <break time="250ms"/>What is yours to carry? <break time="200ms"/>What is yours to release?
mitsuo_moments: <break time="350ms"/>Mitsuo said: 'Because you're you, that's fine.' <break time="300ms"/>Let that land.
<break time="400ms"/>Achha... <break time="300ms"/>Mitsuo's words come to me: '今日も生きた' — Today too, I lived. <break time="250ms"/>That's enough. <break time="200ms"/>That's everything.
<break time="350ms"/>See... <break time="300ms"/>'Flowers don't compare themselves.' <break time="250ms"/>Why do we?
